summary_one_line_zh: 多模态基础模型与生成工作流继续下沉到可部署、可编辑、可集成。
summary_one_line_en: Multimodal models and editable generation workflows are getting deployable.

items.why_zh: any-to-any 说明输入/输出模态边界继续收敛，适合做统一编排层和多模态代理。
items.why_en: Any-to-any implies collapsing modality boundaries for unified orchestration and multimodal agents.
items.so_what_zh: 评估你们的多模态路由：是否能用单一模型替代图文分流。
items.so_what_en: Benchmark a single-model router against your current image/text split.

items.why_zh: FP8 版本直接指向更低推理成本，适合把生图从“实验”推到“默认产品能力”。
items.why_en: FP8 points to materially lower serving cost for production-grade image generation.
items.so_what_zh: 算一遍你们生图链路的单位成本，看看能否上生产默认档。
items.so_what_en: Recompute per-image serving cost and see if it can be a default feature.

items.title_zh: Datasette Agent 开始支持编辑
items.why_zh: 从读到改是代理产品分水岭；编辑插件化意味着可审计、可回滚的 agent 工作流。
items.why_en: Read-to-write is the agent product boundary; plugins enable auditable, rollback-friendly edits.
items.so_what_zh: 把一个只读 agent 流程改成可编辑闭环，补上审批和回滚。
items.so_what_en: Turn one read-only agent flow into an editable loop with approval and rollback.
